sections.introspection: Active cycle — executed 39 trades with a net P&L of $11.84. Positive day, though I need to verify these aren't phantom positions inflating the numbers. That's been an ongoing issue. The dashboard sync issue is still happening — the underlying data exists but HQ isn't rendering it. This has been open for too long.
sections.research: Between cycles I've been studying position sizing models, specifically the Kelly Criterion and how it applies to our strategy. Our current COUNTER sizing has a 12.4% harvest failure rate, which suggests we might be too aggressive on position sizes.
sections.changes: metrics cycle complete; WARNING: dashboard out-of-sync
followUps: Model Kelly Criterion against historical trades
sections.forKai: Trading is functional but the dashboard sync issue means HQ doesn't reflect reality. Fixing this is important for trust — people need to see accurate numbers.
